heroHeadline:
US & Israel Strike Iran,
War Enters Third Week
heroSubtitle: Day 14: Iran fires most intense missile barrage of war (Palmachim, Ovda, Shin Bet HQ; 58 hospitalized). US KC-135 tanker crashes in Iraq — 6 crew missing. French soldier killed in Iraqi Kurdistan — first French combat death. Iran underwater drones sink US-owned tanker near Basra; Iraq oil terminals suspended; 16 ships hit total. UN Security Council condemns Iran. Lebanon: 687 killed, 800K displaced. 15+ countries affected. ~500 tankers stranded in Hormuz.
footerNote: Data compiled from 100+ sources across 4 media poles as of March 13, 2026. All contested claims are marked. Multi-pole sourcing active.
